name: Walk through the Albanilla desert and the thermal baths of Fortuna
name_original: Paseo por el desierto de Albanilla y los baños termales de Fortuna
region_intro: Hiking around Fortuna offers diverse landscapes, from arid desert terrain to mountainous regions and thermal springs. The area is characterized by its varied topography, including hills and elevated areas that provide panoramic views. Fortuna's natural environment supports a range of hiking experiences, from gentle walks to more challenging ascents. Best hiking trails around Fortuna The most popular hiking route is Walk through the Albanilla desert and the thermal baths of Fortuna, a 2.9 miles (4.7 km) trail that takes 1 hour 13 minutes to complete. This easy route explores desert landscapes and thermal springs. Another top favourite among local hikers is Sierra de la Pila – Pico de La Pila loop from Albergue Cabezo de Turra, a moderate 8.0 miles (12.9 km) path. This loop trail ascends through the Sierra de la Pila, offering views from Pico de La Pila. Local hikers also love the Sierra del Corqué loop from Caprés, a 4.9 miles (7.9 km) trail leading through the Sierra del Corqué, often completed in about 2 hours 30 minutes. Hiking around Fortuna is defined by desert landscapes, mountainous terrain, and thermal springs. The network offers options for various ability levels, from easy walks to difficult ascents. The routes in Fortuna are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.3 stars from more than 340 reviews. More than 1600 visitors have used komoot to explore Fortuna's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: What kind of landscapes can I expect to see while hiking around Fortuna?
A: Fortuna offers a diverse range of landscapes for hikers. You'll find arid desert terrain, mountainous regions, and areas featuring thermal springs. The varied topography includes hills and elevated areas that provide panoramic views, making for a unique hiking experience.

Q: Are there hiking trails suitable for beginners or those looking for an easy walk?
A: Yes, Fortuna has trails suitable for all ability levels, including easy walks. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e900566763/walk-through-the-albanilla-desert-and-the-thermal-baths-of-fortuna" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Walk through the Albanilla desert and the thermal baths of Fortuna&lt;/a&gt; is an easy 2.9-mile route that explores desert landscapes and thermal springs.

Q: Can I find loop hikes in the Fortuna area?
A: Yes, there are several loop hikes available. A popular choice is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/10324671" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sierra de la Pila – Pico de La Pila loop from Albergue Cabezo de Turra&lt;/a&gt;, an 8.0-mile moderate path that ascends through the Sierra de la Pila, offering views from Pico de La Pila. Another option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/27630816" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sierra del Corqué loop from Caprés&lt;/a&gt;, a 4.9-mile moderate trail.

Q: What are some notable natural features or landmarks to look out for on hikes near Fortuna?
A: The region is rich in natural features. You can explore the unique desert landscapes of the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3256860" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Desierto de Abanilla&lt;/a&gt;, visit the thermal springs at &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3256870" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Los Baños de Fortuna&lt;/a&gt;, or enjoy views from &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4988220" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pico de La Pila&lt;/a&gt;. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5411808" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Santomera Reservoir&lt;/a&gt; is another scenic spot.

Q: How many hiking routes are available around Fortuna?
A: There are 11 hiking routes documented around Fortuna, catering to various skill levels. This includes 1 easy route, 9 moderate routes, and 1 difficult route.

Q: What do other hikers say about the trails in Fortuna?
A: The routes in Fortuna are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.3 stars from over 340 reviews. Hikers often praise the varied terrain, from desert to mountains, and the unique experience of the thermal springs.

Q: Are there any longer or more challenging hikes for experienced trekkers?
A: Yes, for more experienced trekkers, there is a difficult route available. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e900543498/tour-from-la-garapacha-to-the-cave-of-jaime-el-barbudo" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Tour from La Garapacha to the cave of Jaime el Barbudo&lt;/a&gt; is a challenging 11.7-mile hike with significant elevation gain, offering a more strenuous adventure.

Q: Are there any trails that combine natural beauty with historical or man-made landmarks?
A: Yes, some routes offer a mix of natural scenery and historical interest. While hiking, you might encounter landmarks such as the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1562599" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Coto Cuadros Watchtower&lt;/a&gt;, which provides a glimpse into the region's past amidst the natural surroundings.

Q: What is the typical duration for hikes in Fortuna?
A: The duration of hikes in Fortuna varies greatly depending on the route's length and difficulty. Easy routes like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e900566763/walk-through-the-albanilla-desert-and-the-thermal-baths-of-fortuna" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Walk through the Albanilla desert and the thermal baths of Fortuna&lt;/a&gt; can be completed in just over an hour, while longer, moderate trails such as the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/27630662" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;San Miguel Valley – Leana Spa loop from Fortuna&lt;/a&gt; can take around 4 hours and 45 minutes.

Q: Are there any trails that pass through thermal spring areas?
A: Yes, the region is known for its thermal springs. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e900566763/walk-through-the-albanilla-desert-and-the-thermal-baths-of-fortuna" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Walk through the Albanilla desert and the thermal baths of Fortuna&lt;/a&gt; specifically highlights the thermal baths, offering a chance to experience this unique natural feature.

Q: What kind of elevation changes can I expect on Fortuna's hiking trails?
A: Fortuna's trails feature varied elevation changes, from relatively flat paths in desert areas to significant ascents in mountainous regions. For instance, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/10324671" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sierra de la Pila – Pico de La Pila loop from Albergue Cabezo de Turra&lt;/a&gt; involves over 500 meters of elevation gain, while easier routes have minimal changes.
tips: A thermal oasis literally in the middle of the Albanilla desert. A site recognized for its thermal and therapeutic water baths. With several spas within the town, if you are one of those who enjoy relaxation, this is an ideal place exclusively dedicated to it.
